name: PentAGI
description: PentAGI is an AI-powered autonomous penetration testing system that leverages multiple LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Bedrock, Ollama, DeepSeek, GLM, Kimi, Qwen) for security testing. Features include knowledge graph integration (Graphiti/Neo4j), LLM observability (Langfuse), 20+ professional pentesting tools in sandboxed Docker containers, and comprehensive REST/GraphQL APIs. Docker is installed inside the container.

notes.text: Access the Web UI at https://<IP>:8443 (note: HTTPS)
Docker is installed inside the container - no host socket passthrough required
Configure at least one LLM provider API key before use (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, etc.)
Optional: Enable Graphiti knowledge graph with docker-compose-graphiti.yml
Optional: Enable Langfuse observability with docker-compose-langfuse.yml
Optional: Enable monitoring stack with docker-compose-observability.yml
Change default password immediately after first login
